channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: The TTS-STT Flywheel: Synthetic Entity-Dense Audio Closes the Indic ASR Gap Where Commercial and Open-Source Systems Fail
item.description: arXiv:2605.03073v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Niche-domain Indic ASR -- digit strings, currency amounts, addresses, brand names, English/Indic codemix -- is under-served by both open-source SOTA and commercial systems. On a synthesised entity-dense Telugu test set (held-out by synthesis system), ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, release, arxiv, RAG, audio | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: excel-mcp-server - A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation
item.description: A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
